Title: 第1章 可怕的世界
Rawtext: “2005年，2月19号，一头高一百多米，类似暴猿的巨兽出现在东都郊区，冲入城市大肆破坏。” “在造成数十万人伤亡后，被联邦基地的三支舰队围攻击杀。” “战斗中，驻军共计消耗百万当量核弹一颗，巡航导弹一百五十枚，战机损毁十五架……” “2005年，6月1号上午，一头长三千米，形似鲸鲲的巨兽出现在瀚城上空，再次引发巨大恐慌。” “庆幸的是这头巨兽攻击性不强，并只存在了短短十五分钟，没有引起太大伤亡。” “期间该巨兽无视联邦各种导弹轰炸后消失……” “2005年，8月3号，一头长千米，宛若神话中尘世巨蟒的巨兽出现在澳赫地海的拉尔市，并大肆破坏。” “此次巨兽事件造成上百万人伤亡，最终以巨兽轻伤离开而结束。” “该事件中，军队消耗百万当量核弹三颗，其它导弹三百二十枚，军舰五艘，弹药不计其数。” “至此，新纪元开启……” 2055年，傍晚。 房间里，一个少年坐在电脑面前，神色凝重，正仔细地看着网络上搜出来的神话纪元信息。 良久后，陈楚头疼的揉了揉眉心：“这是个什么危险世界啊。” 记忆已经苏醒了大半天，通过整理这一世的混乱记忆，陈楚发现这个世界历史，科技，文明都和原先的世界十分相似。 但一切都在几十年前拐了个弯，一些宛若神话生物的巨兽降临。 伴随着这些巨兽出现又消失，全世界都发生了变化，那些在枪炮出现后消失的民间修炼者再次崛起。 经过几十年的发展，一些强大的修炼者可以硬撼导弹轰炸，以人之身击沉航母，撕裂巨兽，强大可怕。 这种情况下，各个联邦国家在研究更加先进的科技和武器时，修炼之风也大肆盛行。 当然，这些还不至于让陈楚头疼。 穿越重生嘛，虽然是第一次没有经验，但有着成年人思维的他还是很快接受了这些，哪怕这个世界混乱了一点。 但问题是…… 想到这里，陈楚转头看向一旁的玻璃水缸。 准确的说，陈楚是在看里面那条趴在石头上，全身白色，长十公分，有着四肢和六根粉角的蝾螈。 随着经济发展，生活水平提高，这个世界的宠物市场也越发繁荣，品种更是花样繁多。 猫狗这些就不用说了，养蜥蜴，养蟒蛇，这些也成了常态，甚至还有人喜欢养蚂蚁，昆虫。 比如之前的他，喜好就和别人不一样，养了一条水陆两栖的六角蝾螈，还弄了个布置不错的水晶玻璃柜。 当然，这些都不是重点。 重点是此时陈楚脑海中，出现了两个身体的感觉。 一种就是作为人类坐在椅子上，另一种则是四爪趴地，以腮呼吸的奇怪触感。 只不过相对于人类身体的控制自如，那个幼小的身体则让他感觉有些不协调，趴在石头上不敢乱动。 就像原本的单核处理器，突然要处理双核处理器的事情，运算力有些跟不上。 而且突然多了个‘身体’，陈楚在懵逼时还有些茫然。 他不知道是什么原因造成的这种情况，为什么会穿越重生？还有万一这头六角龙死了，会不会对他造成影响。 除此之外，这个比巴掌还小的‘身体’有什么用？养肥了都不够两口吃。 一时间，陈楚坐在椅子上想了很多，但……都没什么卵用。 这时，一个虎头虎脑的少年推开门，对电脑面前的陈楚喊道：“哥，吃饭了。” “哦，来了。”陈楚站起身。 他这一世的身份是一个高一学生。虽然才高一，但按本世界标准已经成年了。有一个十三岁的弟弟，母亲是一家金属制炼公司的基层管理。 至于父亲，据说很早就病逝了。 正常病逝，没有什么意外。 所以不会出现父亲在陈楚小时候意外失踪，后面他和弟弟意外得知真相后，怒而报仇的狗血剧情。 当然，也没了他父亲其实出身权贵，因一些特殊原因在他小时候离开，十多年后回来相认的可能。 陈楚来到楼下餐厅时，弟弟陈虎已经上桌，边上还坐着一个看起来四十来岁，气质温柔的漂亮女人。 看着坐下的陈楚，张晓兰关心问道：“阿楚，你现在感觉怎么样？明天能上学吗。” “已经没事了。” 张晓兰顿时松了口气，点了点头，声音温和道：“没事就好，你这次是真的把我们吓到了。” 和身体壮实爱运动的弟弟不同，陈楚从小就体弱多病。 稍微受凉就发烧感冒，严重点不是肾炎就是肺炎。 昨天半夜突然发烧，早上被发现时已经烧到了四十一度，去诊所输了一上午的液才降下来。 当时把张晓兰和陈虎都吓了一跳，包括医生都差点以为他挺不过去，让赶紧送大医院。 而事实是真的没挺过去，导致了陈楚意识苏醒，只不过这点除了他没人知道。 张晓兰关心道：“等下吃完饭，记得吃药。” “嗯，我知道。” “还有，要是感觉哪里还不舒服，我们就去医院看看。” “嗯。”为了避免出现意外，饭桌上陈楚都显得比较沉默。 不过他之前的性格本来就比较沉闷内向，所以张晓兰和陈虎都没有发现什么异常。 吃完饭后，还是病号的陈楚被赶回房间，陈虎抱着篮球出去找朋友玩去了，张晓兰一个人在厨房收拾。 回到楼上时，陈楚手里还拿着一盘解冻虾肉，这是六角蝾螈……不对，应该说是‘他’的食物。 鱼缸里，十公分长的白色蝾螈抬头，黑芝麻一样的小眼睛看着‘天外’缓缓落下的巨大夹子。 蝾螈的视力很差，加上体积的原因，在它视角里，那越过玻璃缸的手臂，二十多公分长的夹子都十分庞大。 上面夹着的虾肉都有它半个头那么大。 陈楚意识控制六角蝾螈张嘴，一口吞下虾肉。 这种自己喂自己的感觉，让他有些不习惯，不由下意识舔了舔舌头。 嗯，味道好像不错。蝾螈那白色的小脑袋眨了眨眼。 蝾螈别看个头小，食量却很大，平时要吃下相当于三分之一身体的食物才会停口。 但这次…… 陈楚不停夹起一个个撕烂的虾肉，被投喂的蝾螈不停张口吞食，就像一个喂不饱的黑洞，只进不出。 只是一会，六角蝾螈就吃下了相当于自身体积的食物。 在陈楚感知中，那些食物进入‘它’体内后，顺着喉咙掉进胃里，眨眼就在可怕的消化能力下消失。 与此同时，随着大量的食物吞下，以蝾螈的胃为中心，一丝丝温暖的感觉弥漫蝾螈全身，接着是痒。 浑身都在痒。 痒的陈楚都感觉有些难受，不由张嘴……嘎！ 蝾螈的声音就像小孩的哭啼，只不过很小，小到微不可查。 紧接着在陈楚吃惊目光下，六角蝾螈体型以肉眼可见的速度增长了一圈，体长也涨到了十一公分。 一公分，也就是一厘米，看起来不多，但这个增长在眨眼之间就完成。 这个消化能力和成长速度，陈楚不但没有感觉到害怕，反而眼睛一亮。 若只是普通的六角蝾螈，物种极限就三十公分左右，因此就算陈楚能控制自如又怎么样？有什么用？ 这可是一个核弹到处炸，修炼强者可以击沉航母的可怕世界。 但现在，他似乎看到了名为未来的光…… 压下心底的激动，陈楚又去楼下冰箱拿出一些虾肉解冻，在感觉蝾螈身体还能吃的情况下，继续投喂。 很快，相当于蝾螈体积一倍的虾肉再次见底。 直到这时，蝾螈身体才传来淡淡的饱腹感。 同时那种成长的感觉再次出现，丝丝温暖传遍蝾螈分身全身，伴随着瘙痒感觉，身躯以肉眼可见速度成长。 然后，陈楚眼前浮现一排透明文字。
Translation: "On February 19, 2005, a giant beast more than 100 meters tall and resembling a violent ape appeared on the outskirts of Dongdu and burst into the city to wreak havoc." "After causing hundreds of thousands of casualties, they were attacked and killed by three fleets of Federation bases." "During the battle, the garrison consumed a total of one million equivalent nuclear bombs, 150 cruise missiles, and 15 warplanes were damaged..." "In 2005, on the morning of June 1, a giant beast 3,000 meters long and resembling a cetacean appeared over Hancheng, causing great panic again." "Fortunately, this giant beast is not very aggressive, and only existed for just 15 minutes, without causing too many casualties." "During this period, the beast disappeared after ignoring various Federation missile bombings..." "On August 3, 2005, a giant beast that is thousands of kilometers long and resembles the mythical giant python appeared in the city of Lar in the Sea of Auch and was wrecked." "This giant beast incident caused millions of casualties, and finally ended with the giant beast leaving with a slight injury." "In this incident, the army consumed 3 million equivalent nuclear bombs, 320 other missiles, 5 warships, and countless ammunition." "At this point, a new era has begun..." Evening, 2055. In the room, a teenager sat in front of the computer with a solemn expression, looking carefully at the mythical era information found on the Internet. After a long time, Chen Chu rubbed his eyebrows with a headache, "What a dangerous world this is." The memory has been awakened for half a day. By sorting out the chaotic memories of this life, Chen Chu found that the history, technology, and civilization of the world are very similar to the original world. But everything turned a corner decades ago, and some giant beasts like mythical creatures descended. With the appearance and disappearance of these beasts, the world changed, and those folk practitioners who disappeared after the appearance of guns rose again. After decades of development, some powerful practitioners can hard shake the missile bombardment, sink the aircraft carrier with the human body, tear the beast, powerful and terrible. Under such circumstances, the wind of cultivation was also prevalent in various federal countries when they were studying more advanced technologies and weapons. Of course, these were not enough to give Chen Chu a headache. Through rebirth, although it was the first time that he had no experience, but he had an adult mindset and quickly accepted these things, even if the world was a little chaotic. But the problem is... Thinking of this, Chen Chu turned his head and looked at the glass water tank next to him. To be precise, Chen Chu was looking at the salamander lying on the stone inside, all white, 10 cm long, with four limbs and six powder horns. With the development of the economy and the improvement of living standards, the world's pet market has become more prosperous and diverse. Cats and dogs don't need to be mentioned. Keeping lizards and boa constrictors has become the norm. Even some people like to keep ants and insects. For example, he had different preferences from others before. He raised an amphibious hexagonal salamander and built a well-designed crystal glass cabinet. Of course, none of this is the point. The point is that at this moment, two physical sensations appeared in Chen Chu's mind. One is to sit on a chair as a human being, and the other is to lie on the ground with four claws, with the strange touch of breathing on the cheek. However, compared to the control of the human body, the young body made him feel a little uncoordinated, and he did not dare to move on the stone. Just like the original single-core processor, the computing power can't keep up with the sudden need to deal with the dual-core processor. And suddenly there was an extra ‘body’, and Chen Chu was still a little dazed when he was confused. He did not know what was causing this situation, and why was he traveling through rebirth? If this hexagonal dragon died, would it affect him? Other than that, what good is this‘ body ‘smaller than a slap? Fattening is not enough for two bites. For a while, Chen Chu sat in a chair and thought a lot, but... there was nothing for eggs. At this moment, a teenager with a tiger head and a tiger brain pushed open the door and shouted to Chen Chu in front of the computer, "Brother, it's dinner." "Oh, here it is." Chen Chu stood up. His status in this life is that of a high school student. Although only a freshman, but by this world standard has reached adulthood. There was a thirteen-year-old brother whose mother was the grassroots manager of a metal refining company. As for the father, he is said to have died very early. Normal illness, no accidents. Therefore, there will be no dog blood plot in which his father disappeared unexpectedly when Chen Chu was a child. Later, after he and his brother unexpectedly learned the truth, they were angry and avenged. Of course, there was no possibility that his father was actually from a noble family. For some special reasons, he left when he was a child and returned to recognize him more than ten years later. When Chen Chu came to the restaurant downstairs, his younger brother Chen Hu was already on the table, and there was a beautiful woman who looked to be in her 40s and had a gentle temperament. Looking at Chen Chu sitting down, Zhang Xiaolan asked with concern, "Chu, how are you feeling now? Can I go to school tomorrow?" Everything's fine... Zhang Xiaolan immediately relaxed, nodded, and said gently, "It's okay, you really scared us this time." Unlike his physically strong athletic younger brother, Chen Chu was frail from an early age. If you get a little cold, you will have a fever. The severity is either nephritis or pneumonia. A sudden fever broke out in the middle of the night last night. When it was discovered in the morning, it had already burned to 41 degrees, and it took all morning to drop down to the clinic. At that time, Zhang Xiaolan and Chen Hu were shocked. Even the doctors almost thought that he could not survive, so they rushed to the big hospital. And the truth is that he really didn't survive, which led to Chen Chu's awakening, but no one knew about it except him. Zhang Xiaolan cared, "When you finish eating, remember to take your medicine." Yes, I know "Also, if you don't feel well, we'll go to the hospital." "Hmm." In order to avoid accidents, Chen Chu seemed to be quiet at the dinner table. However, his previous personality was already dull and introverted, so neither Zhang Xiaolan nor Chen Hu found anything abnormal. After the meal, Chen Chu, who was still ill, was driven back to his room. Chen Hu went out to meet friends with a basketball. Zhang Xiaolan was alone in the kitchen to clean up. When he returned upstairs, Chen Chu was still holding a plate of thawed shrimp meat. It was a hexagonal salamander... No, it was‘ his’ food. In the fish tank, the ten-centimeter-long white salamander looked up, and the small black sesame-like eyes watched the huge clip that was slowly falling ’outside the sky'. The salamander's vision is very poor, coupled with the size of the reason, in its perspective, beyond the arm of the glass jar, more than 20 cm long clips are very large. The shrimp meat on it was as big as half a head. Chen Chu consciously controlled the hexagonal salamander to open its mouth and swallowed the shrimp. This feeling of feeding himself made him somewhat unaccustomed and he couldn't help but subconsciously lick his tongue. Well, it tastes good. The little white head of the salamander blinked. Don't look at the salamander, but the amount of food is very large. You usually have to eat the food equivalent to one-third of your body before you stop. But this time... Chen Chu kept clamping the torn shrimp meat one by one. The feeding salamander kept opening its mouth and swallowing it. It was like an underfed black hole, only it couldn't get in and out. After a while, the hexagonal salamander ate the equivalent of its own volume of food. In Chen Chu's perception, after those foods entered the body of ‘it’, they fell down the throat and into the stomach, and blinked and disappeared under the terrible digestive ability. At the same time, with a large amount of food swallowed and centered on the salamander's stomach, a hint of warmth permeated the salamander's entire body, followed by itching. It itches all over. The itchy Chen Chu felt a little uncomfortable. He couldn't help but open his mouth... quack! The salamander's voice was like a child's cry, but it was too small to detect. Then, under Chen Chu's startled gaze, the size of the hexagonal salamander increased at a speed visible to the naked eye, and the body length also increased to eleven centimeters. A centimeter, or centimeter, doesn't look like much, but the increase is done in the blink of an eye. This digestion ability and growth rate, Chen Chu not only did not feel afraid, but his eyes lit up. If it is just an ordinary hexagonal salamander, the species limit is about 30 centimeters, so what if Chen Chu can control it freely? What's the use? This was a nuclear bomb exploding everywhere. Cultivators could sink the aircraft carrier's terrible world. But now, he seems to see a light called the future... Pressing down the excitement in his heart, Chen Chu went downstairs to the refrigerator to take out some shrimp meat to thaw, and continued to feed it while feeling that the salamander's body could still eat it. Soon, the shrimp meat equivalent to twice the size of the salamander was once again bottoming out. It was not until this time that the salamander's body received a faint feeling of satiety. At the same time, that feeling of growth reappeared, and the silk warmth spread throughout the whole body of the salamander, accompanied by the feeling of itching, and the body grew at a speed visible to the naked eye. Then, a row of transparent text appeared in front of Chen Chu's eyes.

Title: 第2章 天赋
Rawtext: “你的蝾螈分身通过大量进食，获得一点进化点。” “属性页面生成中……生成完成。” 伴随着两行透明文字浮现，在陈楚愕然中，一个透明页面框浮现在他眼前。 体质：7（普通人10） 力量：7 敏捷：6 精神：10 天赋：灵魂分裂 分身体：六角蝾螈【普通的水陆两栖生物，成年体长三十公分，战力0】 等级：无 天赋：无 进化值：1／10【进化值积满时，可开启进化】 “属性页面……”陈楚缓缓吐出一口气，压下心底的兴奋。 作为一个以前喜欢看小说，看动漫，打游戏的半宅男，陈楚很自然就接受了这种意外的展开。 而且他大概知道六角蝾螈为什么会成为他的分身了。 应该和他那个灵魂分裂的天赋有关。 目光扫过各项数据，对自己除了精神，其它属性都低于正常人一截的情况，陈楚没有感到意外。 他这个身体是真的弱。 接着他的目光落在下面分身的数据上，嘴角微微上扬。 只存在于幻想的属性页面，只要进食就能积累进化的分身，这种情况下，他感觉自己这辈子随便都能混的不错了。 “咳……冷静，冷静。”激动过后，陈楚渐渐冷静了下来。 接下来，他又研究了一会属性页面，可惜还是没什么收获。 …… 早上八点，街边人行道上，陈楚穿着白色短袖衬衫，黑色西裤和皮鞋，迎着朝阳走在去学校的路上。 这里不得不说，这个世界的校服款式还不错，穿上这一身后，陈楚整个人都看起来精神了一些。 这时，一旁的陈虎羡慕道：“哥，你穿这身校服好帅啊。” 因为从小体弱的原因，陈楚脸上一直没什么血色，显得白皙干净，并且五官很秀气，比许多女生还好看。 一米七的身形虽然不是很高，略显消瘦，但走路时身姿笔直，很有气质，给人一种病弱美少年的感觉。 “还好吧。”对于这点陈楚比较满意，庆幸穿越后不是丑挫矮。 而相对于哥哥，弟弟陈虎就显得粗犷了一些，才十三岁就有一米七五，身体壮实，虎头虎脑。 今天不止是陈楚开学，陈虎也一样，两人一个初中，一个高中。 并且学校在一个方向，陈虎的学校要近一点，步行二十多分钟左右，陈楚所在的高中大概要走半个小时，隔了个区。 “哥，听说上高中后，你们就可以学习真正的真武了，要是天赋好还能得到国家重点培养。” 陈楚摇头：“想要达到国家培养标准可不简单。” 陈虎挥了挥拳头：“哥，我相信你，你肯定行的。” “……你觉得我这个病秧子一样的身体，修炼天赋会很好？”相对于陈虎的盲目信任，陈楚可没什么信心。 新纪元开始后，经历过十多年混乱，全世界的国家联合组成了现在的联邦众合国，维持稳定了数十年。 目前所在的城市叫雾江城，居住的大部分人都是汉人，实行着十二年的义务教育。 到了高中时，随着身体发育基本成型，所有人就会开始学习联邦统一制定的基础真武。 到了这里，大部分人的人生开始出现分歧。 若是有修炼天赋，并且愿意向武道发展，在高一下学期就会进入武修班，侧重武道，兼学文科。 其他修炼了一学期基础真武，但没有天赋的人，则可以侧重文科理科，以优秀的成绩考入大学。 当然，不管是修炼武道还是学习，有天赋的人都在少数，大部分人在读完高中后就会步入社会。 而既然是修炼武道，一个好的身体自然是基础。 因此陈楚才对自己的修炼天赋不抱希望。 不过他也没有气馁，有着属性页面和可以进化的分身，他依然有站在巅峰的可能。 在半路上陈楚和陈虎分开，顺着人行道的又走了十多分钟，才来到名为南天武高的校门外。 今天是开学日，一辆辆送孩子的轿车几乎将街道堵满。 因为‘灵气复苏’的原因，这个世界的科技文明虽然也在发展，但进展较慢，整体上只比地球先进一点。 因此这些豪车虽然线条更流畅，但依然还是烧油烧电，还没发展到悬浮的地步。 顺着人流，陈楚不急不慢走进学校，按照告示板贴的名字，一路来到高一教学楼二楼三班教室。 此时里面已经有一些学生，显得有些喧哗。 陈楚扫了眼，就随便找了个后排靠窗的位置坐下，心中感叹“没想到，穿越了我还要再读一遍高中。” 很快，班级就坐满了人，大概四十来个，男女比例一比一左右。 九点，一个三十多岁的女人走进教室，穿着正装，脸庞严肃，走进来后就在黑板上写下‘陈琦’两个字。 陈琦站在讲台上，看着下面严肃道：“我叫陈琦，从今天起，就是你们的班主任。” 接着她直接指着前排两个学生：“你，暂代班长。” “你，暂代武修委员，没问题吧？” 被她点名的两个学生一男一女，其中那个男生更是有些兴奋，起身道：“老师，我没问题。” 那个女生也点了点头：“我也没问题。” “很好，等下你们两个找几个人，去教材室把学习材料领来发下去。” “是，老师。” 接着她看向所有学生，淡淡道：“今天开学第一天，没什么事，主要是让你们认一下所在班级。” “等下领了学习资料，你们就可以自由活动，可以回去，也可以参观学校，明天才正式上课。” “还有，你们现在的座位就是今后坐的位置，没特殊情况不会变动。” “桌下的抽屉里有相应的钥匙，可以把学习资料锁在里面，没必要每天背来背去。” “好了，就这样吧。” 说完，这个叫陈琦的班主任就转身离去，雷厉风行，干净利落，留下那些学生继续懵逼中。 包括陈楚，他也没想到这个世界的高中第一天，居然遇到这么屌的班主任。 还是说，这个世界的教育风格就是这样？ 随便指两个人当班长和什么武修委员，随便交代两句就转身走人，就像多待一会会浪费她生命一样。 正常情况，不是应该让每个学生上台自我介绍，让大家混个脸熟，早点融入班级气氛，融入新环境吗？
Translation: "Your salamander clone gets a little evolutionary point by eating a lot." "Property page generation... generation complete." With two lines of transparent text appearing, in Chen Chu's astonishment, a transparent page frame appeared in front of him. Physique: 7 (Ordinary 10) Strength: 7 Dexterity: 6 Spirit: 10 Talent: Soul Split Divided body: hexagonal salamander [ordinary amphibian, adult body length 30 cm, combat power 0] Grade: None Talent: None Evolution value: 1/10 [Evolution can be started when the evolution value is full] "Attribute page..." Chen Chu breathed out slowly, suppressing the excitement in his heart. As a man who used to enjoy reading novels, watching anime, and playing games, Chen Chu naturally accepted this unexpected unfolding. And he probably knew why the hexagonal salamander had become his alter ego. It should have something to do with his talent for splitting souls. Chen Chu was not surprised by the fact that his other attributes were lower than those of a normal person, except for his spirit. His body is really weak. Then his gaze fell on the data of the doppelganger below, and the corner of his mouth rose slightly. It only exists on the fantasy attribute page. As long as he eats, he can accumulate evolutionary doppelgangers. In this case, he feels that he can mix well at will in his life. "Cough... calm down, calm down. After the excitement, Chen Chu gradually calmed down. Next, he studied the property page for a while, but unfortunately, he still did not gain much. … At eight o'clock in the morning, on the street sidewalk, Chen Chu, wearing a white short-sleeved shirt, black trousers, and leather shoes, walked toward the school in the sun. I have to say here that the style of school uniform in this world is not bad. After wearing this, Chen Chu's whole body looked a little energetic. At this moment, Chen Hu, who was on the side, said enviously, "Brother, you look so handsome in this school uniform." Because of his infirmity, Chen Chu's face had always had little blood on it. It looked white and clean, and his facial features were very cheerful and better-looking than many girls. Although the figure of 1 meter 7 was not very tall and slightly thin, it was straight and very temperamental when walking, giving a feeling of a weak and beautiful teenager. "It's okay." I'm quite satisfied with this point, and I'm glad that I'm not ugly and short after crossing. Compared to his older brother, his younger brother Chen Hu seemed a little rugged. At the age of thirteen, he had a meter and seventy-five, with a strong body and a tiger head and a tiger head and a tiger head. Today is not just the start of Chen Chu's school, Chen Hu is the same, two people a junior high school, a high school. And the school is in one direction, Chen Hu's school is closer, about 20 minutes on foot, Chen Chu's high school is about half an hour, a quarter away. "Brother, I heard that after high school, you can learn the real martial arts. If you have good talent, you can get key national training." Chen Chu shook his head: "It is not easy to meet the national training standards." Chen Hu waved his fist, "Brother, I believe you, you can definitely do it." "... do you think it would be good to cultivate my body like a sick seedling? Compared to Chen Hu's blind trust, Chen Chu had little confidence. After the beginning of the new era, after more than a decade of chaos, the countries of the world united to form the current federal United Nations and maintained stability for decades. At present, the city is called Wujiang City, and most of the people living there are Han people. Twelve years of compulsory education is practiced. By high school, as the body develops and basically takes shape, everyone will begin to learn the basics of federally unified martial arts. At this point, most people's lives began to diverge. If you have a talent for cultivation and are willing to develop into martial arts, you will enter a martial arts class in the first semester of high school, focusing on martial arts and studying liberal arts. Others who have mastered the basics of martial arts for one semester, but do not have talent, can focus on liberal arts and sciences and enter the university with excellent grades. Of course, whether they are practicing martial arts or studying, talented people are in the minority, and most people will enter society after finishing high school. And since it was a martial art practice, a good body was naturally the foundation. Therefore, Chen Chu was not hopeful about his cultivation talent. However, he was not discouraged. He had an attribute page and a doppelganger that could evolve. He still had the possibility of standing at the top. On the halfway, Chen Chu and Chen Hu separated, and walked along the sidewalk for more than ten minutes before coming outside the school gate called Nan Tianwu Gao. It's school day and a car delivering kids is almost clogging the streets. Because of the "reiki revival", although the world's scientific and technological civilization is also developing, it is progressing slowly and is only slightly more advanced than the earth as a whole. Therefore, although the lines of these luxury cars are smoother, they are still burning oil and electricity, and have not yet developed to the point of suspension. Following the flow of people, Chen Chu walked into the school without hurry, and according to the name on the notice board, he came all the way to the third classroom on the second floor of the high school first teaching building. At this time, there were already some students inside, which seemed to be a little noisy. Chen Chu scanned his eyes and casually found a seat in the back row by the window. He sighed in his heart, "I didn't expect that I would have to read high school again." Soon, the class was full of people, about forty or so, and the ratio of men to women was about one to one. At nine o'clock, a woman in her thirties walked into the classroom, dressed in a formal suit and with a serious face. After entering, she wrote the words‘ Chen Qi ’on the blackboard. Chen Qi stood on the platform and looked at the bottom and said solemnly, "My name is Chen Qi. From today onwards, I will be your class teacher." Then she pointed directly at the two students in the front row: "You, temporary class leader." "You, temporary martial arts practitioner, are you okay?" The two students she named were a man and a woman, and the boy was even more excited. "Teacher, I have no problem." The girl also nodded, "I'm fine, too." "Very good. Wait for the two of you to find a few people and go to the teaching materials room to bring and send the learning materials." "Yes, teacher." Then she looked at all the students and said indifferently, "On the first day of school today, there is nothing wrong, mainly for you to recognize the class you are in." "After receiving the study materials, you can move freely, you can go back, or you can visit the school, and the class will not be officially held until tomorrow." "Also, your current seat is where you will sit in the future. There are no special circumstances that will not change." "There are corresponding keys in the drawer under the desk, you can lock the study materials inside, there is no need to carry them back and forth every day." Alright. Let's leave that. After that, the head teacher named Chen Qi turned around and left. Lei was quick and clean, leaving those students to continue to be confused. Including Chen Chu, he did not expect that on the first day of high school in this world, he actually met such a dumb class teacher. Or is this the style of education in the world? casually refers to two people as the squad leader and some martial cultivator, casually explain two sentences and turn around to leave, just like spending a little more time will waste her life. Under normal circumstances, shouldn't each student introduce themselves on stage, let everyone mix faces, blend into the class atmosphere early, and blend into the new environment?

Title: 第3章 关系
Rawtext: 目送班主任走出教室，其它学生下意识看向前排的班长两人。 没办法，谁让她们是班长和武修委员呢。 见状那两个学生也不怯场，两人走到台上，顿时许多男学生眼睛一亮，因为这个班长很漂亮。 “我叫林雪，作为三班班长，希望大家今后能积极配合班级任务。” 说完，这个叫林雪的女生目光扫过所有人，身上莫名有种强大气场，让许多学生不敢对视。 这时，另一个男生微笑道：“同学们好，我叫尹睿，未来一个学期我和大家都是一个班的同学。” “我希望能和大家相互帮助，一起努力度过美好的第一学期。” “现在我们要去领学习资料，需要一些同学一起，不知道有那些同学愿意帮忙？” “我。” “我也去。” “还有我……” 尹睿说完，就有许多男同学积极站了起来，显得十分热情。 高一正是最美好的年纪，虽然那个叫林雪的女生有些冷傲，气场大，但谁让她漂亮呢。 很快就有六个男生，一个女生愿意为班级做贡献，跟着两人走出了教室。 这时，陈楚前排的男生啧啧道：“连名字都不问就定下班长和武修委员，我敢肯定，这里面一定有什么PY交易。” “PY交易，只是一个班长至于吗？”陈楚有些意外。 前面男生回头，带有深意道：“同学，你有些小看高中的班级干部了，这两个位置可没那么简单。” 说完，这个男生就笑嘻嘻的自我介绍道：“嗨，兄弟，我叫夏右辉，初中在试验三中读的，你呢？” 陈楚简单道：“陈楚，岭山一中升上来的。” “岭山一中啊，那里风景不错，我去玩过一次。” 陈楚看着这个长相憨厚的少年，好奇道：“夏同学，高中的班级干部和初中的有什么区别吗？” “区别可大了。” 夏右辉有些羡慕道：“按照国家规定，所有人高中后都能学习真武，但要知道一个班就有几十个人，一个年级一两千。” “这种情况下，真武老师肯定无法对所有学生都用心，都是几十人甚至几百人一起上课。” “这个时候，班长她们的身份就凸显了出来，作为班级干部，他们只要找个理由就能单独请教老师。” “到时老师稍微指点一些修炼上的技巧，个人经验，就足以让他们慢慢把其他同学甩开。” “而成绩越好，他们受到学校甚至官方的关注就越多，还有资源倾斜，到时候一步快，步步快。” “原来如此。”这么一说，陈楚明白他前面为什么会说有内幕了。 这么重要的位置，班主任连那两个同学的名字都不问就直接指定，确实有些奇怪。 这时夏右辉低声道：“还不止如此，我听说高中的武道班级干部，每个月都有贡献点奖励。” “贡献点，是什么？”陈楚有些疑惑，‘他’确实不知道这些。 夏右辉摇头：“是一种修炼武道的重要资源，我也是听我哥说的，让我高中后有机会赚一点是一点。” 夏右辉显然是那种自来熟的人，和陈楚聊完，就回头去找前面的女生说话去了，很快和周围的同学打成一片。 不止是他，教室里其它学生也差不多，开学第一天对新的环境都感到新奇。 只有少数几个人和陈楚差不多，坐在那里沉默看着周围。 很快，林雪和伊睿就带人大包小包回来。 分发完课本，许多学生离开教室，三三两两走在一起熟悉校园，尤其是班长林雪和委员伊睿两人周围人更多。 陈楚则选择了回家，他要去给六角蝾螈买食物。 “老板，这个虾怎么卖？”农贸市场，陈楚站在海鲜摊前。 “二十一斤。” 陈楚微微一顿，又指着地上装在筐里，已经死了的小鱼：“这种小白条呢？” “五块。” “给我来十斤小白条吧。”家里只有张晓兰有经济收入，生活压力大，陈楚自然能省一点是一点。 扫码付款，陈楚提着十斤鱼，还有一些中午晚上的菜走出市场。 张晓兰每天很早就上班，晚上很晚才回来，因此大部分时间都是陈楚负责做晚饭，陈虎负责洗碗。 回到家，才上午十点过，陈虎还没回来。 陈楚把大部分小鱼丢进冰箱冷冻，把剩下一斤小鱼去内脏，洗干净，砍成一小块小块。 毕竟也算是给自己吃，还是弄干净一点。 早上到现在都没进食，蝾螈分身早已饥饿难耐，陈楚在回来路上就感觉到了分身传来的强烈饥饿感。 当陈楚端着一盘鱼肉上楼时，桌上，白色蝾螈那黑芝麻一样的小眼睛转了转，模样显得有些呆萌。 陈楚意识一动，注意力落在蝾螈身上。 顿时原本懒洋洋趴的蝾螈起身，细小的四肢爬动，屁颠屁颠来到盘子面前吃了起来。 不知道是精神力不够，还是共用一个意识的原因，在陈楚注意力放在自身时，蝾螈分身就会陷入微弱意识状态。 虽然不至于停机，但反应会变得很慢。 同样，当他的意识控制分身时，人类身体的反应也差不多，无法做到同时自如的控制两个身体。 对于这个问题，目前他也不知道怎么解决，只能看今后能不能锻炼出一心二用的能力。 在陈楚若有所思中，他意识控制的六角蝾螈一口一块鱼肉。 这些鱼肉一进入胃部，就以惊人速度被溶解消化，化为一股股微弱的暖流扩散全身，成为了成长养分。 然后就见腮有六角，浑身雪白的蝾螈身体以肉眼可见速度成长。 蝾螈分身的消化能力很可怕，每次吃完相当于体积的食物，就会成长一公分，接着再来一次。 直到累积获得1点进化值后，才会进入一个缓冲期。 按照陈楚观察，分身的体积一天能涨长四公分，获得2点进化值，消耗两斤食物，只要几天就能达到第一次进化需求。 “不知道六角蝾螈进化会变成什么，大六角蝾螈？还是进化成六角龙？”
Translation: Watching the class teacher walk out of the classroom, the other students subconsciously looked at the two class leaders in the front row. I can't help it, who let them be the squad leader and martial cultivator? Seeing that the two students were not afraid of the stage, they walked up to the stage, and suddenly many male students' eyes lit up because the class leader was very beautiful. "My name is Lin Xue. As the third class leader, I hope you can actively cooperate with the class in the future." After that, this girl named Lin Xue scanned everyone with her eyes. There was some kind of powerful aura on her body, which made many students dare not look at her. At this time, another boy smiled and said, "Hello, classmates, my name is Yin Rui. In the next semester, I will be in the same class as everyone else." "I hope to help each other and work together to have a wonderful first semester." "Now we are going to collect the study materials. We need some classmates together. I don't know who are willing to help?" "I ... - I will come too. me too After Yin Rui spoke, many male classmates stood up and seemed very enthusiastic. The first year of high school is the most beautiful age. Although the girl named Lin Xue is a little arrogant and has a big aura, who makes her beautiful? Soon there were six boys, one girl willing to contribute to the class, and the two walked out of the classroom. At this time, the boy in the front row of Chen Chu nodded, "The shift commander and martial cultivator are scheduled to leave without even asking their names. I'm sure there must be some PY transaction here." "PY trading, just as for a squad leader? Chen Chu was a little surprised. The boy in front looked back and said with deep intention, "Classmate, you have underestimated some high school class cadres. These two positions are not so simple." After that, the boy introduced himself with a smile: "Hey, brother, my name is Xia Youhui. The junior high school read it in Experiment 3. How about you?" Chen Chu simply said, "Chen Chu, you came up from the middle of Mount Ling." "Lingshan Yizhong, the scenery there is nice, I went to play once." Chen Chu looked at the thick-looking teenager and asked curiously, "Classmate Xia, what is the difference between high school class cadres and junior high school?" "There's a big difference." Xia Youhui was somewhat envious, "According to national regulations, all people can learn real martial arts after high school, but you need to know that there are dozens of people in one class and one or two thousand in one grade." "Under such circumstances, Teacher Zhenwu will definitely not be able to be attentive to all the students. Dozens or even hundreds of people will be attending the class together." "At this time, the class leaders' identities are highlighted. As class cadres, they can consult the teacher alone as long as they find a reason." "At that time, the teacher will point out some cultivation skills and personal experience, which will be enough for them to slowly throw other students away." "The better the results, the more attention they receive from the school and even the authorities, and the resources are tilted. When the time comes, step by step, step by step." "I see." With that, Chen Chu understood why there was an inside story in front of him. In such an important position, the class teacher did not even ask the names of those two classmates and directly assigned them, which was indeed a bit strange. At this time, Xia Youhui whispered, "It's more than that. I heard that high school martial arts class cadres have some rewards every month." "Contribute points, what is it? Chen Chu was somewhat puzzled. ‘He‘ really didn't know this. Xia Youhui shook his head, "It is an important resource for practicing martial arts. I also listened to my brother. It is a little bit for me to have a chance to earn a little after high school." Xia Youhui was obviously the kind of person who came from acquaintance. After talking with Chen Chu, he went back to talk to the girl in front of him and quickly became one with the classmates around him. Not only him, but other students in the classroom were similar, and they were all new to the new environment on the first day of school. Only a few people, similar to Chen Chu, sat there in silence and looked around. Soon, Lin Xue and Yi Rui returned with large and small bags. After distributing the textbooks, many students left the classroom and walked together to familiarize themselves with the campus, especially the class leader Lin Xue and member Yi Rui. Chen Chu chose to go home. He was going to buy food for the hexagonal salamander. "Boss, how do you sell this shrimp?" At the farmer's market, Chen Chu stood in front of the seafood stall. "Twenty-one pounds." Chen Chu paused slightly, pointing to the small fish that was already dead and loaded in the basket on the ground. "How about this little white stripe?" five pieces "Give me ten pounds of small white bars." At home, only Zhang Xiaolan has an economic income, and life is under great pressure. Chen Chu can naturally save a little. Scanning the code to pay, Chen Chu carried ten kilograms of fish, and some noon and evening dishes walked out of the market. Zhang Xiaolan went to work early every morning and came back late at night, so Chen Chu was responsible for cooking dinner most of the time, and Chen Hu was responsible for washing the dishes. When he got home, it was only after 10:00 in the morning, and Chen Hu had not yet returned. Chen Chu threw most of the small fish into the refrigerator to freeze, removed the remaining kilogram of small fish from the guts, washed it, and cut it into small pieces. After all, it was considered to be for myself to eat, or to clean it up a bit. He hadn't eaten since morning. The salamander clone was already hungry and unbearable. Chen Chu felt a strong hunger coming from the clone on the way back. When Chen Chu brought a plate of fish meat upstairs, on the table, the white salamander's small sesame-like eyes turned around, looking a little dull. Chen Chu's attention fell on the salamander. Suddenly, the lazy salamander got up, his tiny limbs crawled, and his ass came to the plate and ate it. I don't know whether it is due to insufficient mental strength or a shared consciousness. When Chen Chu's attention is placed on himself, the salamander clone will fall into a weak state of consciousness. It won't be a downtime, but it will be slow to react. Similarly, when his consciousness controlled the doppelganger, the human body reacted similarly and could not control both bodies at the same time. At present, he does not know how to solve this problem. He can only see if he can exercise his ability to do two things in the future. In Chen Chu's thoughtfulness, the hexagonal salamander he controlled consciously took a piece of fish. As soon as these fish enter the stomach, they are dissolved and digested at an alarming rate, dissolving into a weak warm current that spreads throughout the body and becomes a growth nutrient. Then hexagonal cheeks were seen, and the snow-white salamander's body grew at a speed visible to the naked eye. The digestive abilities of the salamander clone were terrifying. Each time they ate the same amount of food, they grew by one centimeter, and then again. A buffer period does not occur until 1 cumulative Evolution Point has been gained. According to Chen Chu's observation, the volume of the doppelganger can increase by four centimeters a day, gain 2 evolutionary points, consume two kilograms of food, and meet the first evolutionary requirement in just a few days. "I wonder what hexagonal salamander evolves into, big hexagonal salamander? Or evolved into a hexagon?"

Title: 第4章 真武
Rawtext: 早上出门前，陈楚给蝾螈分身准备了上午的食物。 只不过临行时，今天还没去上班的张晓兰叫住了他们。 老旧的小院门口，张晓兰温柔的帮陈楚整理了一下衣领，看着已经和她一样高的大儿子，眼中满是感慨。 “妈，还有什么事吗？”边上的陈虎有些疑惑。 看着两个儿子，张晓兰微微一笑：“没什么事，就是想对你还有你哥说，刚开学，别有太大压力。” 陈虎不在意道：“只是初中而已，我随便学学就能跟上。” 看着虎头虎脑的二儿子，张晓兰微微苦笑，老二她当然不担心，从小就聪慧好动，身体和学习成绩都很好。 她担心的是老大，高中后就可以修炼真武，但不是所有人都有修炼天赋。 大儿子从小体弱多病，一看就不是能修炼武道的人，而希望越大失望就越大，万一受到打击…… 陈楚平静道：“妈，不用担心，我心里有数。” “……好吧。”张晓兰张了张嘴，最后还是没有再说什么。 挥别张晓兰，陈楚两兄弟走在去学校的路上。 一路上可以看到许多穿着校服的学生也去上学，有的单独一个人，有的几个一路打闹嬉戏，有的骑单车。 联邦的学校以片区划分，所有学生都就近上学，因此许多人和陈楚或者陈虎穿着一样校服。 教室里，班长林雪和委员伊睿早早就到了，周围许多同学围着他们两人聊天，很是热闹。 陈楚刚坐下，前面的夏右辉就凑了过来，神神秘秘道：“阿楚，我已经知道伊睿他们为什么会成为班干部了。” ……阿楚，我们有这么熟了吗？虽然心底吐槽，但陈楚还是配合的好奇问道。 “为什么？” “据说班长的父母就是修炼强者，班主任肯定是想巴结她家。” 好吧，父母都是修炼强者。 陈楚问道：“另一个呢？” 夏右辉低声道：“伊睿也不简单，家在市里有钱有势，说不定在开学前就给班主任送了红包，打过招呼。” 原来如此，果然不管是哪个世界都存在阶级啊。 “这事别到处说。”最后陈楚提醒了一下夏右辉。 不管这事是真是假，作为一个学生还是尽量别在背后议论班主任，否则传到对方耳中不好。 “我知道，这事我只对你一个人说过，其它人我都没告诉。”夏右辉眨了眨眼，一副我很信任你的模样。 这时一个数学老师走了进来，班上一静。 这个世界高中文化课不是很难，听了一节课后陈楚就发呆去了，当然，实际是分神控制家里的蝾螈分身进食。 上午三节课很快就过去，转眼到了中午。 吃过午饭，稍微休息。 所有高一学生浩浩****来到学校后面，用ABCD字母区分的十几栋高楼，环绕中心体育馆组成的修炼区。 按照班级，陈楚等人来到B栋五层修炼教室。 足有五百平的修炼教室里，一个三十多岁，神色冷峻的中年站在高台上，背后是高五米，宽八米的大屏幕。 等到所有学生站好，那个中年人才缓缓睁开眼，锐利的目光让所有人都有种眼睛生痛的感觉。 嘶！ 许多学生都心底一惊，没想到这个老师只是目光就这么可怕。 中年人沉声道：“我叫庞龙，是你们第一学期的真武老师。” “接下来，我会先为你们讲解何为真武。” 说着，庞龙指着台下一堆早准备好的水泥板：“看见那些水泥板没有，来几个男生抬上来。” 只是微微一顿，武修委员伊睿就带头走了出去，接着陆续又有些男生跟上，包括夏右辉。 水泥板有六块，每块长宽一米左右，厚十公分，预计超过了百公斤重。 因此就算两人一组，也抬的小胖子他们十分吃力，同时侧面说明了他们的力量似乎有点大。 按照庞龙要求，伊睿他们把一块块水泥板竖起放在桌上，叠成一排的水泥墙，不知道要做什么。 负手站在台上，庞龙看着下面一张张充满稚气的脸庞，淡淡道：“何为真武，真武就是炼假成真。” “在几十年前武功、修炼这些，只是民间传说，被戏称为花架子，没有一点实战效果。” “就算苦练二十年，也挡不住一颗子弹。” “但这一切在新纪元开始发生改变，有一些先驱者发现，他们可以炼假成真，将过去种种传说变成现实。” “而这，就是真武。” 轰！ 话音刚落，庞龙身上一股可怕的气息爆发，就像一头沉睡的巨兽猛然苏醒。 那强大的气势犹如实质，压的周围空气都发出沉闷爆响，在周围形成一圈圈扭曲气浪劲风，吹的他衣服猎猎炸响。 高台上庞龙身形一晃，宛若瞬移一样跨越三米出现在桌前，汇聚了可怕力量的右手握拳，一拳轰出。 因为力量太强，他的拳头前方甚至出现了一圈圈透明冲击波。 轰！ 在大部分人不敢置信的震撼目光下，六块堆叠在一起的水泥轰然爆炸，烟尘弥漫，声势骇人。 强大力量下，无数碎石泥块就像炮弹四散而出，噼里啪啦砸在十几米外的墙壁上，撞的粉碎时砸出一个个小坑。 还好，庞龙出拳的方向是侧对下面，否则这些威力堪比子弹的碎石落在学生身上，足以将人打成筛子。 咕噜！ 这次就算是陈楚，也咽了咽口水。 虽然网上搜出来的资料上说过，强大的修炼者可以击沉航母，撕裂巨兽，但毕竟只是文字，远远没有亲眼所见来的震撼。 而且六块水泥板接近一米厚，就算是反器材狙击枪也不一定能打穿，但此时居然直接被人一拳轰爆。 这种强大武力，一下让陈楚血液沸腾了起来，对接下来的修炼充满期待。 讲台上，庞龙负手而立，看着下面一张张激动兴奋的脸庞，十分满意自己这一拳效果。 等到烟尘散去，庞龙才缓缓道：“接下来，开始修炼第一步。” “所有人，等下按照我身后显示屏上出现的图案冥想，修炼一个小时，结束后是铸体决的修炼课。” “对了，谁是班长？” “我。”前排的林雪上前一步。 “你吗，精气神饱满，不错。” 看了眼少女，庞龙点头道：“等下你为他们讲解一下什么是筑基，等有人符合筑基的标准再来找我。” “这个班级的武修委员，你负责维持今后修炼课秩序。” “是，老师。”伊睿大声应道。 随即庞龙就转身离去，和第一天的班主任陈琦一样干净利落，留下一脸懵逼的大部分学生。 这样就完了？ 怎么这些老师一个个都很忙的样子？
Translation: Before going out in the morning, Chen Chu prepared the morning food for the salamander clone. However, Zhang Xiaolan, who had not yet gone to work today, stopped them while he was on his way. At the door of the old courtyard, Zhang Xiaolan gently helped Chen Chu tidy up his collar and looked at his eldest son, who was already as tall as her. His eyes were full of emotion. "Mom, is there anything else? Chen Hu on the side was somewhat confused. Looking at his two sons, Zhang Xiaolan smiled slightly: "Nothing, just want to say to you and your brother, just start school, don't have too much pressure." Chen Hu said indifferently, "It's just junior high school, I can keep up with it by studying casually." Looking at the second son of Tiger Head and Tiger Head, Zhang Xiaolan smiled slightly. Of course, she was not worried about the second, she was smart and active since she was a child, and her body and academic achievements were very good. She was worried about the boss. After high school, she could cultivate true martial arts, but not everyone had the talent to cultivate. The older son is frail and sickly from childhood. At first glance, he is not a person who can practice martial arts, and the greater the hope, the greater the disappointment. In case of a blow... Chen Chu said calmly, "Mom, don't worry, I have a number in my heart." "... Fine." Zhang Xiaolan opened his mouth and didn't say anything. Waving goodbye to Zhang Xiaolan, Chen Chu and his two brothers walked on the way to school. Along the way, you can see that many students wearing school uniforms also go to school, some alone, some playing all the way, and some riding bicycles. Federal schools are divided into zones, and all students go to school nearby, so many people wear the same uniform as Chen Chu or Chen Hu. In the classroom, class leader Lin Xue and committee member Yi Rui arrived early. Many students around them chatted with each other, which was very lively. Just as Chen Chu sat down, Xia Youhui in front of him approached and said mysteriously, "Chu, I already know why they became class cadres." ... Chu, do we know each other so well? Although his heart spat out, Chen Chu still asked in a cooperative and curious manner. "Kenapa?" "It is said that the headmaster's parents are cultivators. The headmaster must be trying to stutter her family." Well, both parents are cultivators. Chen Chu asked, "What about the other one?" Xia Youhui whispered, "Yirui is not simple. Her family has money and power in the city. Maybe she sent a red envelope to the head teacher before school started and said hello." So that's it, no matter which world it is, there are classes. "Don't go around talking about it. Finally, Chen Chu reminded Xia Youhui. Regardless of whether this is true or not, as a student, try not to discuss the class teacher behind the scenes, otherwise it is not good to pass it on to the other party's ears. "I know, I only told you about this alone, and I didn't tell anyone else." Xia Youhui blinked, as if I trusted you. At this moment, a math teacher came in and the class was quiet. This world high school culture class was not very difficult. After listening to the class, Chen Chu went dazed. Of course, it was actually a distraction to control the family's salamander clone to eat. Three lessons in the morning passed quickly, turning to noon. After lunch, take a break. All high school students * * * * came to the back of the school and used the ABCD alphabet to distinguish more than a dozen high-rises, surrounding the cultivation area formed by the central gymnasium. According to the class, Chen Chu and the others came to the fifth-floor cultivation classroom in Building B. In the 500-square-foot cultivation classroom, a middle-aged man in his thirties stood on a high platform, with a large screen five meters high and eight meters wide behind him. When all the students stood well, the middle-aged talent slowly opened his eyes. His sharp gaze made everyone feel a pain in their eyes. Sī! Many students were shocked. They didn't expect this teacher to just look at them so horribly. The middle-aged man said in a deep voice, "My name is Pang Long, and I am your first semester's true teacher." "Next, I'll explain to you what real martial arts are." As he spoke, Pang Long pointed to the pile of cement boards that had been prepared under the stage: "See those cement boards? A few boys came to lift them up." After a slight pause, martial cultivator Yirui took the lead and walked out, followed by some more boys, including Xia Youhui. There are six cement boards, each about one meter in length and width, and ten centimeters in thickness, which is expected to weigh more than 100 kilograms. Therefore, even if they were in pairs, the little fat people they were carrying were very difficult, and at the same time, their strength seemed to be a little big. According to Pang Long's request, they put a piece of concrete slab on the table and stacked it into a row of concrete walls, not knowing what to do. The bearer stood on the stage. Pang Long looked at the childish face below and said indifferently, "What is true martial arts? True martial arts is the practice of falsehood." "Decades ago, martial arts and cultivation were just folklore legends. They were jokingly called flower shelves and had no actual combat effect." "Even if you practice for 20 years, you won't be able to stop a single bullet." "But this all began to change in the new era, and some pioneers found that they could practice falsehood and turn the legends of the past into reality." "And this is the real martial art." Boom! Just as the words fell, a terrible aura erupted on Pang Long's body, like a sleeping beast suddenly awakening. The powerful aura was like substance. The pressed surrounding air emitted a dull explosion, forming a circle of distorted winds around it. His clothes were blowing, hunting and exploding. On the platform, Pang Long's body swayed and appeared at the table across three meters like teleportation. His right hand, which had gathered terrible power, clenched its fists and pounded out. Because the power was too strong, there was even a circle of transparent shock waves in front of his fist. Boom! Under the shocking gaze that most people dared not believe, six pieces of cement stacked together exploded, filled with smoke and dirt. Under the powerful force, countless pieces of gravel mud scattered like cannonballs, crackling against the wall more than a dozen meters away, smashing into a small pit. Fortunately, the direction of Pang Long's punch was sideways to the bottom, otherwise these gravels that were as powerful as bullets would fall on the students, enough to sieve people. Gurgling Even Chen Chu swallowed his saliva this time. Although the materials found on the Internet said that powerful practitioners could sink aircraft carriers and tear apart giant beasts, after all, they were only words, far from the shock they had seen with their own eyes. Moreover, the six cement boards were close to a meter thick, and even the anti-materiel sniper rifle could not penetrate it, but at this time, it was directly punched by someone. This powerful force made Chen Chu's blood boil, and he was looking forward to the next cultivation. On the podium, Pang Long stood with his hands down and looked at the excited face below, very satisfied with his fist effect. After the smoke cleared, Pang Long said slowly, "Next, start cultivating the first step." "Everyone, wait a minute and meditate according to the pattern that appears on the display behind me. Practice for an hour. After that, it will be a casting practice class." "By the way, who is the class leader?" "Me." Lin Xue in the front row stepped forward. "You? You're full of energy, that's good." Looking at the girl, Pang Long nodded, "Wait until you explain to them what it is to build a foundation. Wait until someone meets the criteria for building a foundation before coming to me." "Martial cultivator of this class, you are responsible for maintaining the order of future cultivation classes." "Yes, teacher," Yirui replied loudly. Immediately after that, Pang Long turned around and left, just like Chen Qi, the head teacher of the day, leaving most of the students with a confused face. “Just like that? Why do these teachers seem to be busy one by one?

Title: 第5章 天才
Rawtext: 老师走后，班长林雪走上讲台。 不知道她在讲桌上按了那里，身后的大屏幕从中间缓缓裂开，露出后面一朵洁白纯净的莲花石刻。 莲花几乎占据了半边墙壁，花瓣上的纹路和都清晰可见，隐约间散发着奇异光芒。 看着下面所有人，林雪平静道：“真武太过强大，不是普通人能够修炼的功法，因此需要筑基。” “而筑基需要同时达到两个要求，即精神力足够活跃，全身血气蒸腾。” “我身后墙壁上的石刻名为莲台冥想法，上面蕴含了一位修炼强者意念，可以帮助大家快速冥想入门，入定。” “等到你们精神力能清晰勾勒出莲台，就说明符合精神标准了。” “而气血通畅，血气蒸腾的标准，则是需要在半个小时内完成十转铸体决的修炼，同时两种达标才能筑基。” 在林雪讲解这些时，班里大部分学生都神色平静，显然早就知道这些。 只有少数几个学生和陈楚差不多，第一次了解这些，脸上露出思索之色，听的很认真。 “记住，我们能够筑基、修炼真武，是国家对我们这些普通人最大恩惠，不是所有人都能先天觉醒。” “好了，大家散开，开始第一次冥想修炼吧。”说完林雪就转身走下讲台，找了个空旷地方盘膝坐下。 见状其它人也有样学样。 陈楚在人群边缘坐下，按照林雪说，集中注意力看向石刻，顿时那朵莲花在他眼中不断放大。 精神力，对于没有修炼过的普通人来说虚无缥缈，无法感知，无法触摸。 但当那朵莲花占据陈楚所有视线时，他下意识闭上眼睛，随即第一次清晰的感知到了精神力的存在。 无尽的意识黑暗中，一朵只有一些虚线的透明莲花缓缓旋转，存在他脑海。 “这就是快速入门的意思吗，好厉害！”陈楚有些惊叹。 他虽然是第一次修炼，但也明白普通人单是想要通过冥想，从无到有感知到自己精神力这点有多困难。 这还是坐得住的情况下。 正常情况普通人可能闭上眼睛就会胡思乱想，无法定心，更别说集中精神冥想。 可想而知这幅图帮他们省了多少时间。 只是接下来，当陈楚想要清晰观想出那朵莲花实体时，却发现进展极其缓慢，并且很费精神。 只是半个小时他就感觉眼冒金星，精神疲惫，不得不退出冥想。 “居然这么累。”陈楚揉了揉眉心。 陈楚稍微休息，感觉舒服一些后才转头看向四周打量，然后发现大部分同学也已经退出冥想状态。 有的人坐在那里发呆，有的人死死盯着石刻，并且这些人和陈楚一样神色疲惫，一副精神消耗很大的样子。 但还有人在继续冥想。 比如最前排的林雪，伊睿和其它四男三女九个人，夏右辉就在其中。 等了一会，夏右辉和其它五个人也陆陆续续退出了冥想状态，最后只剩下林雪、伊睿和另一个男生。 这种情况下虽然没人提醒，但大家都没出声，避免打扰到他们。 “冥想课结束，即将开始铸体修炼课。”伴随着墙上的喇叭提示声音响起，林雪三人才缓缓睁开眼。 这时，夏右辉不知何时来到陈楚面前坐下，低声道：“第一次冥想的时间长短，其实就是一种天赋表现。” 陈楚转头看向他，这家伙似乎知道很多。 夏右辉羡慕道：“别看我，虽然我的精神天赋比你好一点，但面对那三个家伙还是差了一些。” “我可以肯定，他们最少已经具现出三瓣花瓣了。” “而且看他们没有一点疲惫的样子，精神力明显很充沛，可能要不了两三天就能冥想出完整莲花。” “三瓣！” 陈楚一愣，他连一瓣都没完整观想出来，人家就已经三瓣了，差距有这么大？ 夏右辉拍了拍陈楚肩膀，安慰道：“别惊讶，这就是天才和普通人之间的差距，没法比。” “而且他们虽然没有提前修炼，但早就用了一些资源温养过精神，先天条件比我们强很多。” “不过阿楚你也别气馁，冥想快只是快一步，我们还有超越他们的机会。” 这家伙刚说完，大屏幕就已经重新合上，并且亮了起来，上面出现一个穿着白色练功服的中年人，只见他身形微微下沉，做起手式。 “大家注意。” 前排的林雪缓缓道：“接下来是铸体诀，十八个姿势以特定顺序修炼，可以疏通我们全身脉络，有一定锻体作用。” “等下修炼室的精血石会自动打开，在精血石照耀下我们能轻松感觉到体内的血气，快速入门。” “修炼时，我们要以精神力催动那股气血跟随修炼运转，同时修炼完一遍为一转。” “好了，开始了。” 大屏幕上，中年人开始修炼，速度很慢，并且每一个姿势都十分标准，给陈楚一种在练太极和古瑜伽的感觉。 但当第六个姿势开始，难度一下暴增，许多姿势完全违背了人体学，最后几个姿势他更是看的头皮发麻。 几分钟后，等到中年人演示完一遍，开始第二遍时有人跟着练了起来。 与此同时，修炼教室高十米的吊顶上，一枚人头大小的红色晶石亮了起来，散发出猩红光芒将所有人笼罩。 在红光照耀下，陈楚感觉浑身一热，血液都有些沸腾了起来，下意识开始跟着修炼。 第一个姿势起势比较简单，第二个姿势有点难度，还行，第三个姿势…… 嘶！ 刚做到第三个姿势，半蹲右腿伸开，双手前后伸展，弯腰下伏时，陈楚瞬间感觉腰部筋膜生痛。 那种抽筋一样的剧痛，痛的陈楚脸色发白一动不敢动。 直到过了一会疼痛开始减弱，陈楚已经满头大汗，才敢修炼第四个姿势。 与此同时，随着修炼，陈楚感觉全身血液越发燥热，有一股似有似无的‘气’顺着血液流淌全身。 感觉到这股淡淡的‘气血’，陈楚神色一凛。 他不敢怠慢，刚修炼出来的一点精神力连忙将其约束，让这股淡淡的气血随着修炼而运转…… 此时所有人都在修炼，就是很多人姿势东倒西歪，好点的有十来个人。 比如班长林雪和几个女生，此时她们也随着大屏幕上的教学修炼着，动作生疏，但还算标准。 再加上她们的身体充满柔韧性，赏心悦目，看的许多男生目不转睛，忘了修炼。 不过最快修炼完一转的是一个男生，修炼完后浑身大汗，头上都冒着淡淡的白色蒸汽，用时十分钟。 这么一对比，陈楚发现他这个身体的天赋好像真的很差。 他还在吃力的向后弯腰，单腿回曲，做第九个动作……
Translation: After the teacher left, the squad leader Lin Xue walked to the podium. I didn't know that she pressed there on the lecture table, and the large screen behind her slowly cracked from the middle, revealing a clean white and pure lotus stone carving behind her. The lotus flower occupies almost half of the wall, and the lines on the petals are clearly visible, with a strange glow. Looking at everyone below, Lin Xue calmly said, "True martial art is too powerful. It is not a technique that ordinary people can cultivate, so it is necessary to build a foundation." "The foundation needs to meet two requirements at the same time, that is, the mental strength is active enough, and the blood in the whole body transpires." "The stone engraved on the wall behind me is called Lotus Meditation. It contains the idea of a cultivator, which can help everyone get started and settled quickly." "Wait until your mental strength can clearly outline Liantai, it means that it meets the spiritual standard." "The standard for unobstructed blood and blood vaporization is to complete the cultivation of the 10th Reincarnation Casting Decision within half an hour. At the same time, two kinds of standards can be reached to build a foundation." When Lin Xue explained this, most of the students in the class looked calm, and obviously knew this for a long time. Only a few students were similar to Chen Chu. The first time they understood these things, their faces showed a pondering look, and they listened very seriously. "Remember, our ability to build foundations and cultivate true martial arts is the country's greatest blessing to us ordinary people. Not all of us can be born awakened." "All right, let's disperse and begin our first meditation practice. After saying that, Lin Xue turned around and walked off the platform, finding an empty place to sit on her knees. See also other people also have the same kind of study. Chen Chu sat down at the edge of the crowd. According to Lin Xue, he focused his attention on the stone carvings. Suddenly, the lotus flower continued to expand in his eyes. Spiritual strength was nothing for ordinary people who had not practiced, could not feel it, and could not touch it. But when that lotus flower occupied all of Chen Chu's sight, he subconsciously closed his eyes and for the first time clearly perceived the existence of mental power. In the endless darkness of consciousness, a transparent lotus with only some dotted lines spun slowly, which existed in his mind. "Is that what it means to get started quickly? That's awesome! Chen Chu was somewhat surprised. Although he was practicing for the first time, he also understood how difficult it was for ordinary people to perceive their own spiritual strength from scratch simply by meditating. This is still a case of being able to sit. Under normal circumstances, ordinary people may close their eyes and think wildly, unable to settle down, let alone concentrate on meditation. I can imagine how much time this map saved them. Only next, when Chen Chu wanted to clearly visualize the Lotus entity, he found that the progress was extremely slow and difficult. In just half an hour, he felt Venus, mentally exhausted, and had to quit meditation. "I can't believe you're so tired. Chen Chu rubbed his eyebrows. Chen Chu took a little rest and felt more comfortable before turning his head to look around, and then found that most of his classmates had also withdrawn from the meditative state. Some people sat there dazed, some people stared at the stone carvings, and these people looked as tired as Chen Chu, and they looked very spiritually exhausted. But others continue to meditate. For example, Lin Xue in the front row, Yi Rui and the other four men and three women and nine people, Xia Youhui was among them. After waiting for a while, Xia Youhui and the other five people also withdrew from the meditative state one after another, leaving only Lin Xue, Yi Rui and another boy. Although no one was reminded in this situation, everyone did not speak up to avoid disturbing them. "The meditation class is over, and the casting practice class is about to begin. With the sound of the horn on the wall, Lin Xue's eyes slowly opened. At this time, Xia Youhui came to Chen Chu and sat down at some point and whispered, "The length of the first meditation is actually a talent." Chen Chu turned to look at him. This guy seemed to know a lot. Xia Youhui said enviously, "Don't look at me. Although my spiritual talent is a little better than yours, I'm still a little worse in the face of those three guys." "I'm sure they've got at least three petals." "And they don't look tired at all. They obviously have a lot of mental energy. It may take less than two or three days to meditate on a complete lotus flower." Three Petals Chen Chu was stunned. He didn't even fully visualize one petal. He already had three petals. The gap was so big. Xia Youhui patted Chen Chu on the shoulder and comforted him, "Don't be surprised. This is the gap between genius and ordinary people. It can't be compared." "Moreover, although they did not cultivate in advance, they had already used some resources to warm their spirits. The congenital conditions were much better than ours." "But don't be discouraged, Chu. Meditation is just a quick step. We still have a chance to surpass them." Just after this guy said it, the big screen had already been closed again and lit up. A middle-aged man wearing a white exercise uniform appeared on it. He only saw his body sinking slightly and started to act like a hand. Attention, everybody! Lin Xue, who was in the front row, said slowly, "Next is the casting trick. The eighteen positions are practiced in a specific order, which can unblock our whole body and have a certain forging effect." "The essence bloodstone in the cultivation room will open automatically. Under the light of the essence bloodstone, we can easily feel the blood in our body and get started quickly." "When we are cultivating, we must use our spiritual energy to stimulate that qi and blood to follow the cultivation operation. At the same time, we must cultivate once and then revolve." "All right, here we go." On the big screen, the middle-aged people began to practice, very slowly, and each posture was very standard, giving Chen Chu a feeling of practicing Tai Chi and ancient yoga. However, when the sixth position began, the difficulty increased sharply, many positions completely violated the anthropology, and the last few positions he looked at were more numb. After a few minutes, when the middle-aged man finished the demonstration and started the second time, someone practiced with it. At the same time, on the ten-meter-high ceiling of the cultivation classroom, a head-sized red crystal stone lit up, emitting a scarlet glow that enveloped everyone. Under the red light, Chen Chu felt that his body was warm and his blood was boiling a little. Subconsciously, he began to follow his cultivation. The first posture is relatively simple, the second posture is a bit difficult, okay, the third posture... Sī! Just done the third position, half squatting with his right leg extended, hands extended back and forth, when he bent down, Chen Chu instantly felt pain in the lumbar fascia. That kind of sharp pain like cramps, Chen Chu's face was white and he didn't dare to move. It wasn't until a while later that the pain began to ease and Chen Chu was already sweating heavily before he dared to cultivate the fourth position. At the same time, with the cultivation, Chen Chu felt that the blood in his whole body was getting more and more dry and hot, and there was a seemingly nothing ‘qi’ flowing along the blood throughout his body. Feeling this faint ‘qi and blood’, Chen Chu looked grim. He did not dare to neglect, and the little spiritual energy just cultivated quickly restrained it, letting this faint qi and blood run along with the cultivation... At this time, everyone was cultivating, that is, many people's postures were crooked, and there were more than a dozen people who were better. For example, class leader Lin Xue and a few girls, at this time, they are also practicing with the teaching on the big screen, their movements are strange, but they are quite standard. In addition, their bodies were full of flexibility and pleasing to the eye. Many of the boys who looked at them did not look away and forgot to cultivate. However, the fastest to complete the cultivation was a male student. After the cultivation, he was sweating heavily, with a faint white steam on his head. It took ten minutes. By contrast, Chen Chu found that his physical talent seemed really bad. He was still struggling to bend backwards, single-legged, doing the ninth movement...

Title: 第6章 天王
Rawtext: 这个世界的学习压力不大，高中上午八点半上文化课，下午一点半武修课，四点就到了放学时间。 放学后可以参加学校的社团活动，也可以离校回家。 伴随着放学钟声响起，学校顿时喧哗了起来，数以千计的学生从各个教学楼涌出。 很快一个个足球，篮球，网球，甚至走廊上到处都是学生的身影，还有那些去参加社团活动的人更是打打闹闹。 对于大部分高中生来说文化课枯燥，武修课艰难，还是社团活动有意思。 尤其是那些没有修炼天赋，选择了文化课的高二高三学生，浑身都散发着青春洋溢的气息。 讴歌青春，享受轻松的校园生活。 相对于热闹的文学区，武修区就安静了许多，一个个待在修炼室苦修，给人一种完全是两个世界的感觉。 陈楚背着个单肩包，揉着肩膀从B栋教学楼走出来。 从对真武的兴奋到现在浑身酸痛，精神疲惫，只用了短短几个小时。 冥想法就不用说了，本来就耗费精神，但至少是在学校的帮助下直接入门，第一次时长在班里也处于中等。 但铸体决的进展却太过缓慢。 直到放学，他才勉强能做完十八个姿势，在精血石光芒下感觉到了所谓的气血，整体进度在班里处于最差。 不算最快的那个，最慢的那个也在三十多分钟完成了第一转，其它人大概在二十多分钟左右。 并且一个小时的铸体修炼课上，最快的那个人修炼了四遍才停下，并且修炼时长越来越短。 而他修炼一转后就感觉气血不足，体力有些跟不上。 也就是说在修炼上他的精神天赋还行，但身体因为体质弱的原因天赋很差。 或者说他的精神天赋其实很好，哪怕在灵魂分裂的情况下精神天赋上也属于中上等，若是灵魂完整的话…… 抬头看了眼天上悬挂的烈日，陈楚脸上露出淡淡笑容：“还好，能修炼就行，整体上和我预料的差不多。” 对于这种情况他早有预料，虽然在之前也抱有自己其实是个天才的幻想。 但现实很残酷，他的综合修炼天赋很一般，在四十人的班级里处于中下等，更别说上千人的全年级了。 不过天赋不行，外挂来凑。 想到这里，陈楚意念一动唤出了属性页面。 体质：7.1 力量：7 敏捷：6 精神：10.1 天赋：灵魂分裂 功法：莲台冥想法【进度5／100】铸体诀【1／100】 分身体：…… 属性页面上，多出了今天学到冥想和铸体诀，并且后面都有一个进度的备注。 除此之外，体质和精神属性都提升了0.1，应该是修炼效果，没想到这个基础功法都有提升属性的功效。 而且陈楚测试过，当功法被属性页面记录后，他的身体就不会忘记。 比如第一次修炼铸体诀到第十个姿势时，因为太痛，太难受，他不得不中断修炼。 然后稍微休息了一会，重新修炼时，身体很顺畅的就做出了前面九个姿势，没有一点难度。 这种类似熟练固定，学会后身体就会固定的现象，让陈楚和那些‘天才’距离一下拉近了许多。 而且可以清晰看到自己修炼进度这点，让他修炼起来更有动力。 “不急，慢慢来。” 脸上带着轻松笑容，陈楚不急不慢走出了学校。 九月的天气炎热，还好城市绿化做的不错，陈楚走在人行道树荫下，迎着淡淡凉风朝市场方向而去。 此时街道上车来车往，沿路高楼大厦林立，许多广告牌上挂着一些明星广告，两边商铺也摆满了各种商品，十分繁华。 在路过一个路口时，有些饿了的陈楚顺手买了个鸡蛋饼，一瓶果汁。 回到家，五点。 陈楚先拿出一些鱼肉用微波炉解着冻，接着是处理晚上的菜，回锅肉过水切片，姜葱蒜拍好。 弄好这些，才去把解冻的鱼肉端出来处理干净，切成小块方便进食。 二楼房间，已经长到十八公分长，粗了一倍的六角蝾螈在陈楚意识控制下，吧唧吧唧吃着鱼肉。 伴随着胃部消化食物，连续两次吃撑下，六角蝾螈以肉眼可见的速度变粗了一圈，长了两公分。 这个成长速度，比吃了金坷垃膨胀的还快，完全违背生物的成长规律。 进化值也累计到了5点。 只要再吃个两三天，分身就能开启第一次进化，对此陈楚有些期待。 吃饱喝足的蝾螈分身趴在桌上，脸上露出人性化的懒散，陈楚则打开电脑，准备搜索关于真武的资料。 不知道是不是当时烧的太严重，几乎将‘他’烧死，造成脑细胞损伤，这几天陈楚梳理下发现很多记忆都变得模糊。 只有一些包括母亲，弟弟，还有日常习惯等记忆深刻的内容比较清晰，弄的他今天就像一个修炼小白。 按理说在这个武道盛行的世界哪怕他家庭普通，接触不到高端信息，也不应该一些常识都不知道才对。 此时随着陈楚精确搜索，网络上顿时冒出大量关于真武的信息，包括真武起源，真武发展历史。 还有陈楚想知道的真武境界的划分，被称为真武九重天。 一重最低，九重最强，至于怎么个强法却没有详细介绍。 除此之外，网络上随便一搜就能找到许多开武馆的高手表演视频。 有的人表演一拳打穿墙壁，有人一跳几十米高在高楼大厦间飞檐走壁，又或者身外火焰环绕等。 还有炼体强者硬抗冲锋枪，狙击枪，甚至测试火箭弹轰炸毫发无伤的画面。 热血沸腾的浏览了一会视频，陈楚才想起正事，找了找，搜出一篇点赞很高，关于高中筑基功法的介绍。 “当前的高中筑基分为冥想法和铸体诀。” “铸体法为真武天王十年前融合多家武学精要，穷极人体奥秘，最终简化而成的筑基之法。” “此法可帮助普通人舒展全身筋膜，疏通脉络，搬运气血，短期内让全身处于一个气血充盈的状态。” “经研究，铸体法对二十岁以下的年轻人效果良好，高中时期效果最合适。” “辅以莲台冥想法，可以帮人快速筑基，十年来让全国修炼者基数增加了十几倍，大幅度提升了我国基础实力。” “可惜莲台冥想法只有一品，只能用来筑基，比不上九幽天王的九品神莲冥想法……” 在这个帖子下面，还有这个人对天赋的划分。 他认为在学习冥想法，铸体法辅以精血石修炼的情况下，一个星期内完成筑基的学生天赋上等，半个月内中等，一个月内下等。 至于一个月以上，两个月内才完成筑基的人，他不建议继续走修炼一途。 因为在学校各种资源和系统性培养下，都要一个月上才能筑基的人，根本没有什么修炼天赋。 就算强行修炼，这一生也没有突破三重天的希望。 而武道修行犹如逆水行舟，不进则退。 与其将一生的精力花在修炼上，人到老年时气血衰败孤苦一生，还不如做个普通人好好享受生活。 “真武天王，九幽天王。” 看完这副帖子，陈楚印象深的就是这两个人的名字。 不知道是什么样的人，实力有多强，才能创出这种惠及无数人的筑基功法。
Translation: There is little pressure on learning in this world. In high school, culture classes are held at 8:30 in the morning, martial arts classes are held at 1:30 in the afternoon, and it is time to leave school at 4 o'clock. After school, you can participate in the school's community activities, or you can leave school and go home. With the school bells ringing, the school suddenly became noisy, and thousands of students poured out from various teaching buildings. Soon, football, basketball, tennis, and even the corridors were full of students, and those who went to club activities were even more uproarious. For most high school students, culture classes are boring, martial arts classes are difficult, and community activities are interesting. Especially those high school sophomores who did not have a talent for cultivation and chose culture classes, they were full of youthful aura. A song of youth and a relaxed campus life. Compared to the lively literary area, the martial cultivation area is much quieter. One by one, they stay in the cultivation room to practice, which gives people a feeling that they are completely two worlds. Chen Chu walked out of Building B with a shoulder bag on his back. From the excitement of Zhenwu to the soreness and mental exhaustion now, it only took a few hours. Needless to say, meditation is already mentally draining, but at least it is a direct introduction with the help of the school, and the first time is also in the middle of the class. But the progress of the casting decision was too slow. It was not until after school that he could barely finish the eighteen positions. He felt the so-called qi and blood under the light of the essence and blood, and the overall progress was at its worst in the class. Not the fastest one, the slowest one also completed the first turn in more than 30 minutes, and the others were about 20 minutes or so. And in the one-hour casting practice class, the fastest person practiced four times before stopping, and the cultivation time was getting shorter and shorter. However, after his cultivation, he felt that his qi and blood were insufficient, and his physical strength could not keep up. In other words, his spiritual talent was fine in cultivation, but his physical talent was poor due to his weak physique. Or rather, his spiritual talent is actually very good. Even in the case of a splitting of the soul, his spiritual talent belongs to the middle and upper class. If the soul is complete... Looking up at the hot sun hanging in the sky, Chen Chu's face showed a faint smile: "Fortunately, I can cultivate as long as I can. On the whole, it's almost the same as I expected." He had anticipated this situation, although he had previously harbored the illusion that he was a genius. But the reality is very cruel, his comprehensive cultivation talent is very ordinary, in the class of 40 people in the middle and lower, let alone thousands of people in the whole grade. However, the talent is not good, so hook it up. Thinking of this, Chen Chu's mind immediately evoked the property page. Physique: 7.1 Strength: 7 Dexterity: 6 Spirit: 10.1 Talent: Soul Split Practice: Liantai Meditation [Progress 5/100] Casting Technique [1/100] Divide the body: …… On the properties page, there are more meditation and casting tips learned today, and there is a note of progress behind them. In addition, the physical and mental attributes were improved by 0.1, which should be the cultivation effect. I didn't expect this basic technique to have the effect of improving attributes. And Chen Chu tested it. When the exercises were recorded on the attributes page, his body would not forget. For example, when he first cultivated the casting body to the tenth position, because it was too painful and too uncomfortable, he had to interrupt his cultivation. Then he rested for a while. When he practiced again, his body was very smooth and he made the first nine positions without any difficulty. This kind of phenomenon like skillful fixation, the body will be fixed after learning, so that Chen Chu and those ‘geniuses’ are much closer together. Moreover, he could clearly see the progress of his own cultivation, which made him more motivated to cultivate. "No hurry, take your time." With a relaxed smile on his face, Chen Chu walked out of school slowly. The weather in September was hot. Fortunately, the city greening was doing well. Chen Chu walked in the shade of the sidewalk trees and headed towards the market in the face of the cool breeze. At this time, the streets were full of cars and high-rise buildings along the road. Many billboards were hung with some star advertisements, and shops on both sides were also full of various goods, which was very prosperous. While passing an intersection, some hungry Chen Chu bought an egg cake and a bottle of juice. Go home, 5 o'clock. Chen Chu first took out some fish and thawed the frozen meat in the microwave, then processed the evening dishes, went back to the pot and sliced the meat in water, and took a good shot of ginger and green onion garlic. After finishing these, take the thawed fish out and clean it up, and cut it into small pieces for easy eating. The room on the second floor was already 18 centimeters long, and the hexagonal salamander, which was twice as thick, was under Chen Chu's conscious control, and he was eating fish. Along with the digestion of food by the stomach, after eating twice in a row, the hexagonal salamander became thicker and longer by two centimeters at a speed visible to the naked eye. This growth rate is faster than the expansion of eating golden trash, which is completely contrary to the growth law of living things. Evolution has also accumulated 5 points. After eating for two or three more days, the doppelganger could start the first evolution. Chen Chu was looking forward to it. The full-fed salamander clone lay on the table, his face showing humanized laziness. Chen Chu turned on the computer and prepared to search for information about the real martial arts. I don't know if it was burning too badly at that time, almost burning ‘him’ to death, causing brain cell damage. In recent days, Chen Chu found that many memories had become blurred. Only some of the memorable contents, including his mother, brother, and daily habits, are relatively clear. He is like a cultivator today. It is logical that in this world where martial arts are prevalent, even if his family is ordinary and he has no access to high-end information, he should not be ignorant of some common sense. At this time, with Chen Chu's precise search, a large amount of information about the real martial arts appeared on the Internet, including the origin of the real martial arts and the history of the development of the real martial arts. There was also a division of the realm of true martial arts that Chen Chu wanted to know about, which was called the Ninth Heaven of True Martial Arts. The first level was the lowest, and the ninth was the strongest. As for what kind of strong method was used, it was not introduced in detail. In addition, you can find many master performance videos of Kaiwu Hall at any time on the Internet. Some people perform a punch through the wall, some jump tens of meters high and fly through the walls between high-rise buildings, or surrounded by flames outside. There were also images of hard anti-assault rifles, sniper rifles, and even test rocket bombardment without injury. After browsing the video with enthusiasm, Chen Chu remembered the business, looked for it, and found a high praise, about the introduction of high school foundation building techniques. "The foundations of the current high school are divided into meditation and casting." "The casting method is the foundation-building method that the True Martial King fused a number of martial arts essences ten years ago, the mystery of the poor extreme human body, and finally simplified." "This method can help ordinary people stretch the fascia of the whole body, unblock the veins, transport qi and blood, and let the whole body be in a state of qi and blood filling in the short term." "After research, the casting method has a good effect on young people under the age of 20, and the effect in high school is the most appropriate." "Supplemented by Lotus Platform Meditation, it can help people quickly build a foundation, which has increased the base of practitioners nationwide by more than ten times in the past ten years, and greatly improved China's basic strength." "It's a pity that Lotus Terrace Meditation has only one grade. It can only be used to build a foundation. It is not comparable to the Ninth Stage Divine Lotus Meditation of Nine Serenities Heavenly King..." Below this post, there is also this person's division of talent. He believes that in the case of learning meditation, casting method supplemented by fine blood stone cultivation, students who complete foundation building in one week have superior talent, medium in half a month, and low in one month. As for those who completed the foundation building in more than one month and only within two months, he did not recommend continuing on the path of cultivation. Because under the various resources and systematic training of the school, it takes one month to build a foundation, and there is no talent for cultivation at all. Even forcibly cultivating, there was no hope of breaking through the third heaven in this lifetime. And the martial arts practice is like walking against the water, if you don't go in, you will retreat. Rather than spending a lifetime of energy on cultivation, when people reach old age, their blood and blood decay for a lifetime, it is better to enjoy life as an ordinary person. "True Martial Heavenly King, Nine Serenities Heavenly King." After reading this post, Chen Chu was impressed by the names of these two people. I don't know what kind of people they are, and how strong they are in order to create this foundation-building technique that benefits countless people.

Title: 第7章 安负卿
Rawtext: 晚上吃饭时，张晓兰关心了一下陈楚今天的修炼问题。 包括弟弟陈虎也有些好奇。 只不过这才第一天学习，而且只是学了筑基的普通功法，所以陈楚只是简单说了两句就结束了话题。 吃过晚饭，陈楚洗了个澡回到房间，盘膝坐在**开始冥想。 随着他闭目凝神，顿时漆黑脑海中虚幻的莲花缓缓浮现。 按照那个帖子的说法，一品莲台冥想法，在冥想具现这朵莲花时，就是一个不断纯化凝聚精神力的过程。 把普通人松散虚无的精神力，凝聚成可以微弱干涉物质的‘真实’存在，是引气入体的筑基关键。 至于什么是引气入体没有细说，只是说到了这一步，学校的老师自然会告诉他们。 莲花有十二瓣，下午冥想课时陈楚耗费了半个小时，凝聚出了大半片花瓣。 此时随着他修炼，那片花瓣继续以缓慢的速度变得完整。 呼！ 半个多小时后，陈楚缓缓睁开眼，神色有些疲惫，但眼中却露出满意之色，因为他完全具现出了一片花瓣。 只是熟练度这次只提升了4点，比下午少了1点，不知道是不是第一次修炼有冥想图帮助的原因。 不过按照这个速度，就算一次4点，他一天修炼两次的情况下，预计再过十来天就能突破。 而且这次修炼，精神属性再次提升了0.1。 接下来，陈楚又在房间里修炼铸体决。 虽然没有精血石光芒辅助，但有属性页面在，陈楚修炼铸体决时依然敏锐感觉到体内那股淡淡气血。 在身体修炼时，精神力控制那股气血跟随运转，所过之处微不可查的强化着体质，第一遍用时三十五分钟。 接着又修炼了一遍，用时三十分钟，熟练度＋2。 只是这次体质属性只提升了0.1，效果比下午第一次搬运一转气血的提升少了一半。 连续修炼两遍后，陈楚就不行了，整个人感觉精疲力竭，不管是体力还是精神都消耗太大。 体质还是太差了啊，只是搬运两转气血就不行了。 感叹中，陈楚喝了点热水，就躺在**沉沉睡了过去。 对于这种可以修炼出超凡力量的功法，陈楚很有动力。 就算因为体质原因，一开始慢一点也无所谓，他有属性页面可以固定熟练度，有努力就有收获。 要不是修炼一次很耗费体力和心神，需要休息很久来恢复的话，他恨不得一天二十四小时都在修炼。 第二天，陈楚刚走进教室，就见所有人都在讨论修炼的事情。 有人问对方冥想到第几瓣花瓣了，也有人关心怎么修炼铸体决才能快一点，持久一点，感觉修炼好难。 还有少数几个女生，从她们诉苦的情况看已经准备放弃修炼。 她们每次修炼后浑身酸痛，疲惫，冥想后更是眼冒金星，恶心想吐，这种情况显然没什么修炼天赋。 陈楚来到座位坐下，前排的夏右辉就凑了过来：“阿楚，你冥想和铸体决的进度怎么样了？” “还行吧。”陈楚随口道。 夏右辉不死心的追问道：“还行是多少？” “你猜。” “我们可是好兄弟啊，你居然让我猜，只是筑基功法的修炼进度而已。”夏右辉一副痛心疾首的模样。 “你不是也没说吗，要不你先说一下你修炼到哪步了？”陈楚不为所动。 “这有什么不能说的。” 只见夏右辉谦虚道：“我的天赋很普通，现在只冥想到第三瓣花瓣，铸体决勉强可以半小时搬运两转。” “昨天晚上我只修炼了六次，就感觉很累睡觉去了。” ……陈楚突然不想和这个家伙说话了。 铸体决半个小时搬运两转，等于十五分钟就能修炼一次，而且可以一口气修炼六次，冥想法也比他快了两倍。 夏右辉好奇问道：“阿楚，你呢？” “比你差多了，冥想法第一瓣花瓣，气血搬运一转三十分钟。”从夏右辉的进度上，可以看出他的进度很一般，所以陈楚没有隐瞒。 但陈楚说完后，夏右辉微微一愣：“不对啊，我记得阿楚你昨天快一个小时，才勉强完成一次运转吧？” “应该是第一次修炼比较生疏吧，晚上第二次修炼就熟练多了。”陈楚随口道。 “……这样吗。”夏右辉若有所思地点了点头。 上午的文化课一晃而过。 中午，陈楚端着食堂打的饭菜，在饭堂找了个角落坐下，还没吃，夏右辉就兴奋的跟了过来。 夏右辉兴奋道：“阿楚，全年级的新生排名出来了，你猜班长林雪她排名多少？” “这个还有排名？”陈楚有些懵。 大学校花什么的排名他听说过，没想到读个高中，并且这些人才接触修炼就有了个新生排名。 “阿楚，你可别小看这个排名。” 夏右辉摇头：“我们武高今年新生有一千八百多人，所有人都修炼了筑基法，能够脱颖而出的都是天才。” “而且排名只记录前面一百名，能上榜的都不简单。” “比如一班的安负卿，已经观想出十一瓣花瓣，铸体决半个小时内可以搬运七转，位列第一名。” “我感觉要不了两天，她就会第一个成功筑基。” “……好吧，我是废物。”听到这个夸张进度，陈楚一时间不知道该说什么。 他半个小时才勉强一转，人家半个小时都能七转了，莲台观想法更是到具现十一瓣的地步。 这种差距，已经大到陈楚嫉妒都嫉妒不起来。 见陈楚一时没开口，以为他受到打击的夏右辉连忙安慰道：“阿楚，别灰心，这只是筑基而已。” “筑基功法修炼的快，不代表她们和真武功法契合高。” “哪怕我们这次慢她们十天半个月筑基，只要修炼的真武功法契合度高，很快就能追上她们。” “真武功法还有契合度，那是什么？”陈楚有些意外。 “咳……这个我其实也不是很了解，我哥以前就随口跟我提了一句。” 夏右辉干咳一声：“你猜猜看，我们班长林雪在多少名？” “哈哈哈哈，你肯定猜不到。”不等陈楚猜，夏右辉就哈哈大笑了起来，迫不及待地说道。 “林雪才67，67名啊，笑死我了。” “那个女人昨天那么傲，我还以为她天赋有多夸张呢，没想到才67名。” “哈哈哈哈……阿楚，你知道吗，当时我看到这个排名笑了很久。” 咳！ 陈楚看了眼他身后原本走过，忽然停下的少女，尤其是少女那越发冷淡神色，不着痕迹的转移话题。 “夏右辉，你怎么知道这些的？修炼进度这个好像只有本人才知道吧，而且谁给他们排的名？” “你不知道吗？”夏右辉一愣。 “新生排名就在学校官网上挂着啊，只要关注官网的人都知道了。” “至于修炼进度，则是早上别人问她们时她们自己说出来的，有人专门整理出来排了个名单。” “虽然这个排名不是很准确，每天都有变化，但也侧面说明了她们的天赋潜力，许多老师都在关注。” 说完，夏右辉缩了缩脖子，莫名其妙道：“奇怪，我怎么感觉有点冷……”
Translation: At dinner in the evening, Zhang Xiaolan cared about Chen Chu's cultivation today. Including his younger brother Chen Hu, he was also a little curious. However, this was only the first day of learning, and he only learned the ordinary techniques of foundation building, so Chen Chu simply said two simple sentences and ended the topic. After dinner, Chen Chu took a bath and returned to the room, sitting on his knees * * to begin meditation. As he closed his eyes and concentrated, the illusory lotus in his dark mind slowly emerged. According to that post, Yipin Liantai Meditation is a process of constantly purifying and condensing spiritual strength when it embodies this lotus flower. Concentrating the spiritual power of ordinary people into a "real" existence that can weakly interfere with matter is the key to introducing qi into the body. As for what is attracting breath into the body, I did not elaborate, but when it comes to this step, the school teacher will naturally tell them. Lotus flowers have twelve petals, and Chen Chu spent half an hour in afternoon meditation classes, condensing half of the petals. At this time, as he cultivated, the petals continued to become complete at a slow pace. <Hoo!> After more than half an hour, Chen Chu slowly opened his eyes, looking a little tired, but his eyes showed satisfaction, because he completely showed a petal. It's just that the proficiency has only increased by 4 points this time, which is 1 point less than in the afternoon. I don't know if it is the reason why the meditation map helps for the first time. However, at this rate, even if it is 4 o'clock at a time, he is expected to break through in ten days under the condition of cultivating twice a day. And this time, the spiritual attributes were increased by 0.1 again. Next, Chen Chu practiced casting again in the room. Although there was no ray of essence and blood, there was an attribute page on the page. Chen Chu was still keenly aware of the faint Qi and blood in his body when he was cultivating and casting his body. When the body was cultivating, the psychic force controlled the flow of qi and blood to follow the operation, and the invisible place of the passage strengthened the constitution. It took 35 minutes for the first time. Then he practiced again. It took him 30 minutes, and his proficiency level increased by 2. However, this time, the physical attributes only increased by 0.1, and the effect was less than half that of the first turn of Qi and Blood in the afternoon. After practicing for two times in a row, Chen Chu could not do it. The whole person felt exhausted, both physically and mentally consumed too much. The constitution is still too bad, just carrying two revolutions of qi and blood is not enough. With an exclamation, Chen Chu drank some hot water and fell asleep. Chen Chu was very motivated about this technique that could cultivate extraordinary powers. Even if it is due to physical reasons, it doesn't matter if it is slow at first. He has a property page that can fix the proficiency, and if he works hard, he will gain something. Had it not been for the fact that cultivating once was physically and mentally draining and required a long rest to recover, he would have liked to spend twenty-four hours a day cultivating. The next day, just as Chen Chu entered the classroom, he saw everyone discussing cultivation. Some people asked the other person how many petals he had meditated on. Some people also cared about how to cultivate the casting body to be faster, last longer, and felt that it was difficult to cultivate. There were also a few girls who, judging from their complaints, were ready to give up their cultivation. After each cultivation, they were all sore and tired. After meditation, they were even more nauseous and wanting to vomit. Obviously, they had no talent for cultivation. Chen Chu came to his seat and sat down. Xia Youhui, who was in the front row, came over and said, "Chu, how are your meditation and body casting progress?" "Not bad," Chen Chu casually said. Xia Youhui relentlessly asked, "How much is enough?" "Guess what?" "We are good brothers. You actually let me guess, it's just the progress of foundation building exercises. Xia Youhui looked sad. "Didn't you say that? Why don't you tell us where you've gone in your cultivation? Chen Chu was unmoved. "What can't be said?" Xia Youhui said modestly, "My talent is very ordinary. Now I only meditate on the third petal. The cast body can barely move two turns in half an hour." "I only practiced six times last night, so I felt very tired and went to bed." ... Chen Chu suddenly didn't want to talk to this guy anymore. The casting decides to move two revolutions in half an hour, which is equivalent to 15 minutes to cultivate once, and can be cultivated six times in one breath. Meditation is also twice as fast as him. Xia Youhui asked curiously, "Chu, what about you?" "Worse than you. Meditate on the first petal. Qi and blood move for 30 minutes. From Xia Youhui's progress, it can be seen that his progress is very general, so Chen Chu did not hide it. But after Chen Chu finished speaking, Xia Youhui was slightly stunned: "No, I remember that you barely completed a run for almost an hour yesterday, right?" "It should be that the first cultivation is relatively rustic. The second cultivation in the evening is much more skilled. Chen Chu said casually. "... Is that so?" Xia Youhui thoughtfully nodded. The morning culture class passed by in a flash. At noon, Chen Chu took the meal from the canteen and found a corner to sit down in the canteen. Before he could eat, Xia Youhui followed with excitement. Xia Youhui said excitedly, "Chu, the ranking of freshmen in the whole grade is out. Guess how much Lin Xue, the class leader, is ranked?" "Does this still have a ranking? Chen Chu was a little confused. He had heard of the ranking of what colleges and universities spent, but he did not expect to go to high school, and these talents had a freshman ranking when they were exposed to cultivation. "Chu, don't underestimate this ranking." Xia Youhui shook his head: "We have more than 1800 new students in Wu Gao this year. All of them have cultivated the foundation building method. All of them are geniuses who can stand out." "And the ranking only records the top 100. It's not easy to get on the list." "For example, a class of An 'eqing, has imagined eleven petals, casting body can be moved seven turns in half an hour, ranking first." "I feel that within two days, she will be the first to successfully build a foundation." "... Well, I'm trash." Chen Chu didn't know what to say for a moment when he heard this exaggerated progress. He barely made a turn in half an hour, and everyone could make seven turns in half an hour. Liantai Guan's ideas were even more to the point of having eleven petals now. This gap was so large that Chen Chu couldn't be jealous. Seeing Chen Chu's silence for a moment, Xia Youhui, who thought he had been hit, immediately consoled him, "Chu, don't be discouraged. This is just building a foundation." "The quickness of the Foundation Building Cultivation Technique does not mean that they are aligned with the True Martial Arts." "Even if we slow them down this time for 10 days and half months to build a foundation, as long as the cultivation of true martial arts is highly compatible, we will soon catch up with them." "True martial arts have a degree of fit, what is that? Chen Chu was a little surprised. "Cough... I actually don't know much about this. My brother casually mentioned it to me before." Xia Youhui coughed, "Guess how many of our squad leader Lin Xue is here?" "Hahahaha, you can't guess. Without waiting for Chen Chu to guess, Xia Youhui laughed and said impatiently. "Lin Xue is only 67th, 67th, she laughed me to death." "That woman was so proud yesterday. I thought how exaggerated her talent was. I didn't expect only 67." "Hahahaha... Chu, you know, I saw this ranking and laughed for a long time." cough! Chen Chu looked at the girl who was walking behind him and suddenly stopped, especially the girl who looked more and more indifferent and changed the topic without traces. "Xia Youhui, how do you know all this? It seems that only I know the progress of cultivation, and who ranked them?" "Don't you know?" Xia Youhui was stunned. "The freshman ranking is on the school's official website, as long as everyone who follows the official website knows it." "As for the progress of the cultivation, they said it themselves when others asked them in the morning. Someone specifically compiled a list." "Although this ranking is not very accurate and changes every day, it also illustrates their talent potential, and many teachers are paying attention." After that, Xia Youhui shrunk his neck and said inexplicably, "Strange, why do I feel a little cold..."

Title: 第8章 双胞胎
Rawtext: 看着对面兴奋的夏右辉，陈楚在桌下不着痕迹的踢了他一脚。 不过这一脚没太用力，夏右辉没有反应过来，然后就要继续开口说什么时，他身后传来冷冷的声音。 “这位同学，67名很好笑吗。” 瞬间夏右辉浑身一僵，他听出了这是他们班长的声音。 夏右辉脸上笑容一顿，脖子有些僵硬地回头，忽然他脸上堆满笑容：“哈，哈哈……是班长啊，班长大人，要不要一起坐？” 那热情的样子，完全看不出刚才还在笑对方排名低。 “我才67名，可不敢和这位同学坐在一起。” 林雪双手抱胸，目光冷笑，扫了眼对面坐着的俊美少年，接着才低头落在夏右辉身上，淡淡道。 “这位同学，我记得你叫夏什么吧，请问你在新生榜第几名？” “排名，什么排名。”夏右辉一脸茫然。 见他装傻充愣，林雪冷笑道：“怎么，敢在背后嘲笑别人，却不敢承认吗，刚才你不是在笑我排名很低吗？” “有吗？班长，你肯定听错了，你可是我们班级颜面，我怎么可能嘲笑你呢，崇敬都来不及。”夏右辉义正言辞，说完看向陈楚。 “是不是啊，阿楚。” 咳…… 陈楚干咳一声，低下头喝了口汤：“我什么都不知道。” 见状夏右辉翻了个白眼，眼神在说‘兄弟，你不够义气啊。’ 陈楚瞟了他一眼，回了个‘别挣扎了，前面你说的她全都听见了，就算我帮你解释也没用。 这种情况下，我觉得你还是自杀轻松一点。’ 哼！ 看着眉来眼去的两个男生，林雪没有再说什么，哼了哼转身离去。 林雪刚走，夏右辉就苦着脸：“阿楚，完了完了，我要被她记在本子上了。” 陈楚没好气：“谁让你在背后笑人家的，排名这个东西在背后说两句没什么，你居然还嘲笑。” “而且嘲笑就算了，正主刚好路过听到……”这个运气，就算是陈楚也不由摇头。 不过有一说一，这个班长确实很漂亮。 一头黑发被染成紫色，鹅蛋形的脸庞白净，明媚大气，本就精致的五官还画了淡淡眼线，让狭长的眼眸更显魅力。 身高应该有一米七，苗条有致，短袖白色衬衫校服被撑的高高鼓起，至少是B＋，说不定是个C。 穿着西裤的长腿也笔直修长，再加上少女特有的青春气息，难怪只是两天就在班上拥有很高人气。 按照网络上的打分标志，单单是长相就可以打个90分，属于女神级。 不过原本陈楚以为这个班长的性格偏高冷，没想到有些火辣，不好惹。 “说起这个。” 夏右辉神秘兮兮的看了看周围，然后低声道：“阿楚，你知道吗，班长还有个双胞胎妹妹。” “双胞胎！妹妹。”陈楚微微一顿。 夏右辉点头：“对，班长妹妹叫林雨，也是九班的班长，和我们班长一样漂亮。” 这次哪怕是陈楚也有些意外，这个颜值的美少女，还是一模一样的双胞胎，啧啧……
